mvp_tagline: AI Discovery Coach for transition moments
problem_summary: Segment defaults to comfort playlists at low-energy transition moments due to decision fatigue—not because reco feeds are unavailable.

segment.description: Indian urban listeners aged 22–35 who listen 5+ hours/week, get ≥60% of listening from saved playlists or liked songs, and rarely engage with Discover Weekly meaningfully
segment.example_context: Friday 6pm, tired after work, only playing a 2022 indie playlist

hypothesis: An explainable AI coach that names why the user is looping and offers three research-grounded discovery paths will increase intentional discovery sessions compared to opening Home or Discover Weekly cold.
user_flow: User describes transition moment or picks a persona matching the segment
LoopBreak returns: (1) why you're looping — one sentence, (2) three discovery paths — strategies not tracks, (3) one recommended next action with rationale
User picks a path; optional follow-up refines mood or constraint

success_metrics.label: Discovery session rate
success_metrics.mvp_proxy: User selects and confirms a LoopBreak path

success_metrics.label: New artist listen rate
success_metrics.mvp_proxy: User chooses a path tagged new_artist or forgotten_save

success_metrics.label: D7 retention on explorers
success_metrics.mvp_proxy: Return visit to LoopBreak within 7 days

mvp_features_in: Explainable loop diagnosis grounded in Part 1–2 research
Three discovery paths: mood shift, social/friend, forgotten library
Groq LLM with injected insight_report + interview synthesis
Streamlit UI deployed to production URL

ai_advantage.vs_traditional_reco: Collaborative filtering reinforces familiar clusters; LoopBreak adds intent, moment context, and explainability before any feed
unlocks: Reasoning aloud grounded in research themes
Strategy-level paths instead of black-box track lists

deck_slide_hint: LoopBreak explains why you're stuck at transition moments—then offers 3 discovery paths
